title: X-Wing: Rogue Leader 1

'''''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 1''' was the first issue in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing: Rogue Leader|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'']] series of comics. It was released on [[September 28]], [[2005]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''In the wake of the death of the Emperor and the destruction of the Death Star II, and immediately following the truce at Bakura, a group of Rebel pilots are looking forward to some well-deserved R & R. Instead, they run into a deadly attack by vengeful Imperials that changes the course of all of their lives.''

''Rev up your engines—it's time for the Rogue Squadron to fly again! Join Luke Skywalker, Wedge Antilles, and the rest of the Rogues on a mission that will define them as heroes not just of the Rebellion, but as heroes for the whole galaxy!''

''A return to one of the most requested story lines in ''Star Wars'' history!''

==Plot summary==
[[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] is on Endor shortly after the destruction of [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]]. [[Ten Numb/Legends|Ten Numb]] is helping put out fires in the forest with his [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]]. He is recalled from his duties, in order to obtain a new assignment. On the ground nearby, [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] are looking for imperials when they get attacked by a [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]] using dead [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] as a sash. Wes Janson shoots the Gorax in the eye and it falls over dead. Tycho makes a call to base asking if they can return. Instead he is told to go the western ridge.

[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and his squadron of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] are finishing up with a mission when they are told to return to Endor. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] explains to Wedge that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] is still fighting even though [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] is dead. Every major sector is getting their state assessed, but the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. Luke, Ten, Tycho, Wes and Wedge will make up the new [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] that will check up on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

A week later on Corellia, Rogue Squadron is in the city of [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]]. They have been around the system and have found no imperials, so they decide to relax at a local cantina. Luke senses a disturbance in the force and narrowly avoids a rocket shot at the cantina. Luke jumps to the balcony and defeats the imperial snipers aiming at the Cantina. Luke looks off the balcony and sees that these snipers were just the first of an invading army.
